subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who alone possesseth the power of utterance, Who is sanctified above all sight, and Who is exalted above whatsoever hath been mentioned in the contingent realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالبیان و تنزه عن العیان و تقدس عما ذکر فی الامکان انه
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @wisdom [hikmat], @naming of children; of individuals
